title: Human vs Angel ATFs
wikitext:
[]: Human vs. Angel ATFs             Quote Post by Magneto » Wed May 10, 2017 5:16 pm Kaworu says that humans have Fields A.T, so why can not I ever create a hexagonal shield that repels attacks or shoot a ray of particles? That was a joke, now seriously, I understand what he said, but I think this does not make sense to the angels, think, Field AT = soul wall, this explanation is beautiful to humans, but angels do not Have feelings, have no egos to separate, how would that work for them? When Kaworu says this seems only a metaphor meant only for humans.

[]: Re: Kaworu says that humans have Fields A.T, so why can not I ever create a hexagonal shield that repels attacks or shoo             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed May 10, 2017 6:13 pm Magneto wrote: angels do not Have feelings, have no egos to separate

[]: Re: Kaworu says that humans have Fields A.T, so why can not I ever create a hexagonal shield that repels attacks or shoo             Quote Post by Magneto » Wed May 10, 2017 6:53 pm Reichu wrote: The Angels are human beings with souls of their own, and they most certainly have feelings. BTW: The topic title should be a brief description of the topic , not however much of your post you can fit into the field. I've fixed this, but please don't do it in the future.

[]: Re: Human vs. Angel ATFs             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 10, 2017 6:58 pm Episode 23, Rei's encounter with Armisael is evidence enough that Angels have feelings. Misato explains quite clearly the close relationship between Angels and humans in EoE.

[]: Re: Human vs. Angel ATFs             Quote Post by Magneto » Sun May 14, 2017 5:53 pm Sachi wrote: Episode 23, Rei's encounter with Armisael is evidence enough that Angels have feelings. Misato explains quite clearly the close relationship between Angels and humans in EoE.
